hero.verse: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.

mission.statement: Leading people to become fully devoted followers of Jesus
mission.description: By helping you know Jesus, experience His presence, discover your purpose, and make a difference in our community.

connect.title: Get Connected
connect.description: Explore our ministries and discover meaningful ways to grow, serve, and build relationships.

more.title: Looking For More Ministries?
more.description: Discover new ways to connect with our faith community, grow spiritually, and make a meaningful impact in service.
more.service_desc: Join us in person or online

happenings.label: LATEST HAPPENINGS
happenings.title: Upcoming Events
happenings.app_desc: Stay connected with our community. Get the latest updates and join us from anywhere.
happenings.prayer_desc: Join us for prayer, worship, and community connection every Wednesday at 7:00 PM.
happenings.service_desc: Join us on Sunday at 9:00 AM or 10:30 AM for worship, community, and spiritual growth.

footer.about_desc: Growing together in faith, love, and service
